description: Docs review orchestrator prompt: identifies doc type, runs all three review rounds, and produces a consolidated verdict.
Standalone spec.md reviewer prompt: enforces boundary rules, Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, and Out-of-Scope completeness.
Standalone design.md reviewer prompt: checks three technical sub-sections, optional spec->design mapping, and verifiable constraints.
Standalone plan.md reviewer prompt: validates task field completeness, executable verify commands, and optional design->plan mapping.
